what_it_does: A Supabase CLI cache file recording the latest known CLI version string, 'v2.107.0'.
observations: Contents are the single version string 'v2.107.0'.
Lives under supabase/.temp/, a directory the sibling .gitignore lists as ignored.
This is CLI-managed cache, not authored content.
conventions: Follows the Supabase CLI convention of caching the latest-version check under .temp/cli-latest.
notes: Generated Supabase CLI version cache; just the string 'v2.107.0'.
intention_signals: Caches the latest Supabase CLI version the tool is aware of, likely to support update-availability checks.
contribution: Contributes a timestamped-by-version signal that the Supabase CLI in use was at/around v2.107.0 for this project.
summary_for_embedding: A Supabase CLI .temp cache file holding the latest known CLI version string 'v2.107.0'.
intention_for_embedding: To cache the latest Supabase CLI version for update-check purposes in the local project.
